Off Calendar Aug-20-2007 Continued To Sep-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jun-05-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Marilyn Young appearing for beneficiary Rosemary Kvaternick. Gary Georgeff appearing for personal representative Annabelle Haga. Mr. Gomez and Mr. Patton are in court. Mr. Georgeff said he filed the verification on Fridy. He has a copy of the Oregon order regarding the settlement of the will contest. Karen Sweet has standing under that order. She is no longer interested in the silverware. Ms. Kvaternick can have it if she pays the appraisal value. Mr. Georgeff wanted the Court to allow the sale of real property with terms stated and to approve the settlement on the promissory note. All beneficiaries are in agreement but counsel has not heard from Ms. Sweet. Court wants Mr. Georgeff to send a revised order to her attorney and wait 10 days before submitting the order to the Court for signature.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.
